arts.ttl: Everton job too big an opportunity to turn down - Moyes
arts.sum: David Moyes says rejoining Everton was "too big an opportunity to turn down" after replacing Sean Dyche to become Toffees manager for the second time.

arts.ttl: David Moyes singles out Everton star who can keep Toffees up - 'He could be the one!'
arts.sum: Dominic Calvert-Lewin has struggled for goals this season but new boss David Moyes needs the misfiring striker to find his shooting boots

arts.ttl: Every word Aston Villa boss Unai Emery said about Donyell Malen, transfers, injuries, Everton and Moyes
arts.sum: Overall, maybe some tactical work they are going to change, but I think the players they are playing more or less, tomorrow they will be on the field defending Everton. “But of course, the mix we are trying to understand, with the new idea and style [of] David Moyes, and as well with the players they have.”

arts.ttl: January transfer news and rumours: Elye Wahi to West Ham, Devyne Rensch to Everton, Leipzig to cancel Noah Okafor deal
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest transfer news and rumours, including Elye Wahi to West Ham, Devyne Rensch to Everton, and an update on Noah Okafor.

arts.ttl: Celtic fans hit with stringent Aston Villa Champions League ticket scramble with vouchers and in-person pick up
arts.sum: The Premiership champions have been in negotiations with the Birmingham club to try and secure the maximum allocation

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Aston Villa tickets: prices and availability
arts.sum: Arsenal meet Aston Villa in a key Premier League fixture on January 18, and tickets...

arts.ttl: Five players for your Fantasy team this week
arts.sum: Gameweek 21 features some exciting midweek Premier League clashes and Enda McElhinney has picked out five players to include in your Fantasy Football team.

arts.ttl: 'Different beast Everton too big to turn down'
arts.sum: David Moyes says he will try to prove himself again after returning to Everton as manager 12 years after he departed to take over at Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa open talks to sign France international
arts.sum: L'Equipe reported on Monday that Aston Villa had enquired about France international Loic Bade, whom Monchi had signed for Sevilla in January 2023. Aston Villa have formally opened talks with Sevilla over Loic Bade, according to Fabrizio Romano.

arts.ttl: Moyes at Everton: What can FPL managers expect?
arts.sum: The former West Ham boss has returned to Goodison Park after almost 12 years away The post Moyes at Everton: What can FPL managers expect? appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.
